ItacAcademyItem.Name: Bell`Ingegni (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: According to Vincenzo Auria and Antonino Mongitore the Bell`Ingegni academy was founded in 1621. According to Michele Maylender this academy never existed.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
